message:
Add implementation plan (13 tasks across 6 phases)

Phase 1: Foundation (scaffolding, parser, evidence, models)
Phase 2: CLI adapter + agent loop
Phase 3: Web adapter (forked superpowers-chrome)
Phase 4: Fanout + validate commands
Phase 5: API server
Phase 6: Containerization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
